title: Bad Vegan and the Teleportation Machine
original_title: Bad Vegan and the Teleportation Machine
overview: Lily, a failing and fairly crap stand-up comedian, falls for Spike, a sexy physicist who enlists her to work on his teleportation machine, changing her life forever.
